column3: She solved the **crossword** in ten minutes.
He plays **sudoku** every morning with coffee.
They finished the **jigsaw** after three weeks.
My grandfather taught me how to play **chess**.
We played **checkers** on the porch all evening.
Her **knitting** hobby keeps her fingers busy.
She enjoys **crocheting** warm blankets for friends.
The **embroidery** on this pillow looks gorgeous.
My mother loves **sewing** in her spare time.
**Quilting** is her favorite weekend activity.
He makes bowls at his local **pottery** studio.
**Woodworking** requires patience and sharp tools.
The old man sat **whittling** a small figure.
**Scrapbooking** helps her preserve precious memories.
She hangs **macrame** plant holders around the house.
Each **bead** in the necklace tells a story.
The **loom** creaked as she wove the fabric.
She bought soft blue **yarn** for the sweater.
Her **needlework** is displayed on every wall.
She wears a silver **thimble** while sewing.
The **spool** of thread rolled across the floor.
Grandma made a beautiful **patchwork** blanket.
**Tatting** produces delicate lace through knotted threads.
A medieval **tapestry** hung above the fireplace.
**Whitework** requires excellent lighting and patience.
The **enamel** pin collection covers his whole jacket.
She studies **ceramics** at the community art center.
The **kiln** fires ceramics at high temperatures.
He painted a blue **glaze** on the mug.
Each **figurine** on the shelf was handmade.
She keeps every **trinket** from her travels.
This ring is my favorite **keepsake**.
His sports **memorabilia** fills the entire basement.
This watch is a treasured family **heirloom**.
She buys furniture at the **antique** shop downtown.
He became a serious coin **collector** at twelve.
**Philately** was once called the hobby of kings.
**Numismatics** requires knowledge of history and metals.
Her tiny dolls sit inside the glass **showcase**.
The old **curio** shop smells of dust and wood.
His tiny **diorama** recreates a forest scene perfectly.
Each painted **miniature** took him several hours.
Model **assembly** requires steady hands and tiny tweezers.
She dipped her **paintbrush** into the yellow paint.
His **watercolor** landscapes hang in the local gallery.
She placed her canvas on the wooden **easel**.
He mixed bright colors on his wooden **palette**.
This blue **pigment** comes from crushed minerals.
She carries a small **sketchbook** everywhere she goes.
His **pencilcase** holds every shade of graphite.
She draws with soft **charcoal** on rough paper.
The **pastel** drawing captured the sunset beautifully.
She primed the **canvasboard** before starting to paint.
His detailed **etching** took two months to complete.
**Printmaking** combines art skills with chemistry knowledge.
The ancient **woodcut** print shows a mountain village.
Her colorful **linocut** hangs above the couch.
He made a quick **doodle** during the boring meeting.
The **calligrapher** wrote wedding invitations by hand.
An old **inkwell** sits beside his writing desk.
The old **quill** scratched gently across the paper.
He wrote the letter on yellow **parchment** paper.
Her unfinished **manuscript** sits in the bottom drawer.
The **whistler** performed old folk melodies beautifully.
Her soft **humming** filled the quiet kitchen.
He plays soft tunes on his clay **ocarina**.
He plays the **harmonica** while walking through the park.
His old **banjo** still sounds bright and lively.
She learned the **ukulele** during summer vacation.
He keeps an old **songbook** near the piano.
The **metronome** ticks steadily during piano practice.
She uses a small **tuner** before every practice.
Her piano **recital** attracted all the neighbors.
**Birdwatching** taught me patience and careful observation.
He built a wooden **birdhouse** for the garden.
The **feeder** attracts cardinals throughout the winter.
She carries a **fieldguide** on every nature walk.
**Angling** requires patience more than any special skill.
His **tacklebox** contains lures from every fishing trip.
He put fresh **bait** on the curved needle.
The shiny **lure** attracted several curious fish.
A red **bobber** danced on the quiet water.
He cast the **reelrod** far into the calm lake.
**Boating** on weekends helps him forget work stress.
They paddled the small **rowboat** across the pond.
**Kayaking** on the river became her weekend obsession.
**Paragliding** offers breathtaking views of the valley below.
He enjoys **metaldetecting** along the quiet beach.
**Foraging** for mushrooms requires knowledge and caution.
**Beekeeping** rewards patience with sweet golden honey.
Her tiny **bonsai** trees require daily careful attention.
The glass **terrarium** houses small green ferns.
His colorful **aquarium** contains twenty tropical fish.
The old **rockhound** collects unusual stones during hikes.
**Spelunking** takes brave explorers deep underground.
She studies **astrology** books every evening now.
He reads **tarot** cards for curious friends occasionally.
**Storytelling** around campfires creates lasting childhood memories.
